title: Vector Store Management Flow

create_store: START: Stores::create(name, description, fileIds, expiresWhenIdleFor, provider?)
[GeminiStoreGateway] POST /fileSearchStores → get store ID → call getStore()
[if fileIds not empty] loop: addFile(provider, storeId, fileId) for each
[OpenAiStoreGateway] POST /vector_stores with all params → call getStore(id)
RETURN: Store(provider, id, name, fileCounts, ready)
get_store: RETURN: Store(provider, id, name, fileCounts, ready)
store_add_document: [if StorableFile] Store::storeFile(file) → Files::put(file, provider) → returns HasProviderId
dispatch event: AddingFileToStore(invocationId, provider, storeId, fileId)
dispatch event: FileAddedToStore(invocationId, provider, storeId, fileId, documentId)
store_remove_document: dispatch event: RemovingFileFromStore(invocationId, provider, storeId, documentId)
dispatch event: FileRemovedFromStore(invocationId, provider, storeId, documentId)
store_refresh: RETURN: new Store instance with fresh data

key_relationships: StoreProvider (interface) implemented_by GeminiProvider, OpenAiProvider (via ManagesStores trait)
Store::add() uses PreparesStorableFiles concept: converts StorableFile → uploads via Files::put → HasProviderId
StoreFileCounts embedded in Store constructor (completed, pending, failed counts)
GeminiStoreGateway uses HandlesFailoverErrors trait + Http facade for API calls
Events dispatched: CreatingStore, StoreCreated, AddingFileToStore, FileAddedToStore, RemovingFileFromStore, FileRemovedFromStore, StoreDeleted
branching_conditions: Store::add: StorableFile → Files::put upload branch (PreparesStorableFiles used by FileGateways)
Store::add: HasProviderId | string | ProviderDocument → provider add call
Store::remove: deleteFile=true && removed → also deletes underlying file via Files::delete
GeminiStoreGateway::createStore: fileIds not empty → loop addFile per ID

data_objects.StoreFileCounts: value object(completed:int, pending:int, failed:int) — Arrayable, JsonSerializable

important_notes: Stores is a static facade; all real logic flows through Ai::fakeableStoreProvider() → concrete Provider
ManagesStores trait is the bridge: Provider interface methods → StoreGateway calls + event dispatch
GeminiStoreGateway uses 'fileSearchStores/' resource prefix; normalizeStoreId/FileId/DocumentId helpers handle path building
OpenAiStoreGateway uses 'vector_stores/' endpoints; expiresWhenIdleFor converted to days via Carbon
PreparesStorableFiles trait (on FileGateways) extracts content/mimeType/name from StorableFile for upload
File upload during Store::add is delegated to Files::put() which uses the provider's FileGateway
